benefits.description: Tirzepatide had strongest appetite suppression - would not be interested in eating, no food noise, forget to eat meals
With tirzepatide had effortless loss; with retatrutide losing weight on keto/fasting and calorie deficit; retatrutide seems to keep fat burn going without hitting plateau

protocol_notes: Has used tirzepatide, semaglutide, and retatrutide. Currently on retatrutide with keto and fasting. On retatrutide, definitely hungrier but if in calorie deficit seems to lose more. Previously hit plateau after few weeks on diet/cuts but retatrutide keeps fat burn going.
